title: Github integration ... not integrating?

posts.author: Stuart1745 (Stuart Rampy)
posts.cookedHtml:
so were trying to get out github integrations correct.
Were using the “When an issue is created or updated in , Create an item and sync future changes from Github”

but when we create issues in the repo. no item is created no integration is activated. our integrations activity is 0.

We’ve verified that the connected user is an admin and that the allow 3rd party apps is turned on.

is this integration broken? has anyone else had success with this integration.

posts.author: MsquareAutomation (Msquare Automation Solutions)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi@Stuart1745 ,
Double-check your integration configuration to ensure that you’ve selected the correct repository and have configured the trigger accurately. Make sure the “When an issue is created or updated” trigger is properly set up.

you can use Make as an alternative integration platform to connect GitHub and Monday.com.If you’re comfortable with its interface and capabilities, it can be a robust solution for connecting GitHub and Monday.com while providing more control over the integration process.
